result.reasoning: The user asks for the dimension of the boundary of the tame twindragon rounded to two decimal places. From the <tool_call_history>, step_1 search results provide the Hausdorff dimension as approximately 1.2108. Step_2 and step_3 confirm this value and round it to two decimal places, yielding 1.21. The answer is a numeric value, so no textual casing is involved. Applied casing rule: not applicable as answer is numeric.
